content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Fixed the remaining `ralph-burning-9ni.6.2` prompt-budget regressions by making dependency rendering preserve at least concrete `id` plus status/outcome details under byte pressure, recomputing omission-count text after any dependency-row pop-back trimming, and teaching planned-elsewhere budgeting to keep an over-budget item via truncated base-line fitting instead of silently dropping it. Added focused regressions for a single oversized dependency entry, exact omitted-count reporting, and an oversized planned-elsewhere item while preserving the existing prompt contract and `project create-from-bead` behavior.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected the dependency-section and planned-elsewhere budget code paths plus existing prompt regressions to map each pending amendment onto the concrete rendering helpers in `service.rs` and `project.rs`.
2. [Completed] Patched `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs` so dependency sections fit oversized entries by truncating title/relationship text while preserving concrete id/status/outcome details, and so omission-count lines are recomputed after each pop-back during budget trimming.
3. [Completed] Patched `src/cli/project.rs` so planned-elsewhere budgeting truncates an oversized base line instead of dropping the item, while still preserving summary text when it fits and keeping deterministic ordering/byte accounting intact.
4. [Completed] Added focused regressions for long dependency visibility, exact dependency omission counts, and oversized planned-elsewhere preservation, then ran formatting and the relevant unit/CLI validation slices.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test render_bead_task_prompt_keeps_single_long_dependency_visible_under_budget --test unit -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test render_bead_task_prompt_reports_exact_omitted_dependency_count --test unit -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test apply_planned_elsewhere_budget_keeps_truncated_base_line_when_item_exceeds_budget --lib -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test apply_planned_elsewhere_budget_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed (3 tests).
- `cargo test --test unit render_bead_task_prompt_ -- --nocapture` passed (23 tests).
- `cargo test --test unit create_project_from_bead_context_ -- --nocapture` passed (14 tests).
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ --test cli -- --nocapture` passed (28 tests).

## Outstanding Risks

- Validation was focused on the touched prompt-generation and `project create-from-bead` paths; I did not rerun the full repository test suite or `br lint` because backlog data was unchanged.
- The unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory remains in the worktree and was left untouched.
